item.title: Sesión de Crítica en español
item.description:
Thursday, October 16, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: virtual a través de Zoom

Se invita a los miembros de HCP a unirse a nuestra próxima Sesión de Crítica, dirigida en español por River Claure, artista participante en Cautivo del asombro.Regístrase gratuitamente como presentador para recibir retroalimentación sobre su obra por parte de Claure y otros miembros de HCP, o regístrase como miembro de la audiencia y participa en la discusión.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Film Screening - The Making-of Surface by Alejandra Regalado
item.description:
Wednesday, October 22, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us for the film screening of an original short-form documentary by Alejandra Regalado capturing the making-of her currently exhibited photographic series, Surface. The screening will be followed by an in-depth conversation with the artist led by HCP Exhibitions & Programs Coordinator Areli Navarro Magallón.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Demystifying Portfolio Reviews
item.description:
Tuesday, October 28, 2025 at 5 PM

Location: Online Event via Zoom

Join us online on Tuesday, October 28, from 5:00-6:00pm CST for an informative free webinar covering everything you need to know about portfolio reviews. Having the perspective of both photographer and reviewer, HCP Managing Director of Education Natan Dvir will review important guidelines, discuss best practices, and provide valuable tips and resources.Registration is required using this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Artist Panel Conversation: HCP Fellowship Exhibitions and Fractured Sublime
item.description:
Thursday, November 20, 2025 at 5:30 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us for an Artist Panel Conversation featuring this year’s HCP Annual Fellowship recipients Emma Ressel and Sasha Arutyunova alongside juror Gregory J. Harris and HOU @ HCP gallery artist Daniel Seth Kraus. The dialogue will be facilitated by HCP Exhibitions & Programs Coordinator, Areli Magallón and immediately followed by an opening reception.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Opening Reception: HCP Fellowship Exhibitions and Fractured Sublime
item.description:
Thursday, November 20, 2025 at 6:15 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Thursday, November 20, between 6:15pm to 8pm CST for the opening reception of the annual Fellowship Exhibitions, including Extant Erosions by Emma Ressel and Wind and Other Dangers by Sasha Arutyunova, both juried by Gregory J. Harris, High Museum of Art’s Donald and Marilyn Keough Family Curator of Photography, alongside Fractured Sublime by Daniel Seth Kraus. Guests will have the opportunity to purchase signed copies of exhibiting artists’ books.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Photobook Club - Mark Menjívar
item.description:
Sunday, November 23, 2025 at 2 PM

Location: Hirsch Library at the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston

HCP Members are invited to November’s HCP Photobook Club meeting led by Jon Evans hosting Mark Menjívar, Associate Professor, Interdisciplinary School for Engagement, University of Texas at San Antonio.Registration is available via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Why Images Matter: Truth, Empathy, Connection
item.description:
Wednesday, December 3, 2025 at 6:30 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us on Wednesday, December 3, between 6:30pm to 8:00pm CST for an in-person presentation of Sara Terry’s and Louie Palu’s extraordinary work followed by an engaging conversation led by Lisa Volpe, Curator of Photography at the Museum of Fine Art, Houston (MFAH). This program is made possible thanks to the generous support of Joan Morgenstern and also serves as a tribute to the late Sara Terry, whose recent passing is felt deeply across the photographic community. Sara’s extraordinary commit

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: December Critique Group
item.description:
Sunday, December 14, 2025 at 2 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

HCP Members are invited to our December Critique Group led by Noor Alé, Associate Curator at Moody Center for the Arts, to receive valuable feedback on their work and participate in constructive artistic discussion. Registration is free as Presenters or Attendees. Please visit our Critique Groups page for more information.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Winter Open House
item.description:
Wednesday, December 17, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join HCP staff and faculty on Wednesday, December 17, between 6-9 pm at our Winter Open House with guest speaker Geoff Winningham to receive valuable information about our certificate programs, winter classes, and upcoming events.RSVP is required via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Opening Reception: Foto Futures Exhibition
item.description:
Thursday, December 18, 2025 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Thursday, December 18, between 6pm to 8pm CST for the opening reception of Foto Futures 1, where our inaugural cohort of teens will share their work in the HOU @ HCP gallery! Foto Futures‍, a Community Engagement program, is a springboard for high school students who may be interested in pursuing a higher education degree in photography and/or related media.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Opening Reception: Annual Print Auction Exhibition
item.description:
Thursday, January 15, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Thursday, January 15, between 6pm to 8pm CST for the opening reception of our Annual Print Auction Exhibition, featuring the work of over 75 artists from around the globe.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Photobook Club - Lisa Volpe
item.description:
Sunday, January 18, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Hirsch Library at the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston

HCP Members are invited to January’s HCP Photobook Club meeting led by Jon Evans hosting Lisa Volpe, Curator of Photography, Museum of Fine Arts, Houston.Registration is available via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Curatorial Exhibition Tour
item.description:
Saturday, February 7, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Saturday, February 7 for a curatorial walkthrough of HCP’s 2026 Auction led by Anne Leighton Massoni, HCP Executive Director and Curator. This event is limited to HCP Members and auction ticket holders only (join).RSVP is required via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Spring Open House
item.description:
Thursday, February 26, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us at HCP on Thursday, February 26, between 6-9 pm for our Spring Open House with guest speaker Debra Barrera. Learn about our upcoming photography courses, hands-on workshops, community events, and professional certificate programs. Have your work reviewed, and receive a free personal consultation and a 10% discount on Spring classes.RSVP is required via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Spring Open House (Online)
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Online via Zoom

Join us on Monday, March 9, between 5-7 pm at our Spring Online Open House with guest speaker Tom Griggs. Learn about our upcoming photography courses, hands-on workshops, community events, and professional certificate programs. Have your work reviewed, and receive a free personal consultation from Natan Dvir and a 10% discount on Spring classes.RSVP is required via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Artist Panel Conversation: Rebel Girl and THE VANGUARD
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us on Thursday March 12, 2026 from 5:30 - 6:15pm for an Artist Panel Conversation with the exhibiting artists from Rebel Girl and THE VANGUARD, companion exhibitions featuring the works of three contemporary artists and 20 trailblazing women who exhibited at HCP within its first 20 years.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Opening Reception: Rebel Girl, THE VANGUARD, and soft heat
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 6:15 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Thursday, March 12, between 6:15pm to 8pm CST for the opening reception of companion exhibitions Rebel Girl and THE VANGUARD, featuring three contemporary artists and 20 trailblazing women who exhibited at HCP within its first 20 years. In addition, Jamie Robertson’s solo exhibition soft heat will open in the HOU gallery.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Artist Talk: soft heat by Jamie Robertson
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us on Thursday March 18, 2026 from 6:30 - 8:00pm for an Artist Talk with Jamie Robertson and her solo exhibition in the HOU gallery titled soft heat, a photographic study of wetlands in the Southern United States through black and white infrared film photography.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Online Critique Group - Advanced Photography Practices
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Online Event via Zoom

Advanced Photography Practices Certificate Program students are invited to join a special Online Critique Group led by Cristina Velásquez, Co-Founder & Editor-in-Chief, New Poetics Publishing. to receive valuable feedback on their work and participate in constructive artistic discussion. Registration is free as Presenters or Attendees.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Photobook Club - Peter Brown
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Hirsch Library at the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston

HCP Members are invited to March’s HCP Photobook Club meeting led by Jon Evans hosting Peter Brown, Photographer, Instructor and Advisory Board Member, Glasscock School of Continuing Studies, Rice University.Registration is available via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: April Critique Group: Ben McBride
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

HCP Members are invited to our April Critique Group led by Ben McBride, Assistant Collections Curator in the photography department at the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston, to receive valuable feedback on their work and participate in constructive artistic discussion. Registration is free as Presenters or Attendees. Please visit our Critique Groups page for more information.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Constructing the Real: Eli Durst
item.description:
Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Online Event via Zoom

Join The Myth of the Real (May 16-17) masterclass instructor Eli Durst on Tuesday, April 28, between 6:00-7:00 pm CST as he presents his personal work and discusses contemporary approaches to documentary photography focusing on the tension between observation and intervention.Registration is required using this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Curatorial Exhibition Tour: Rebel Girl, THE VANGUARD, and Scent of Broq-Pa
item.description:
Saturday, May 2, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Saturday, May 2 starting at 10:30 AM for a curatorial walkthrough of HCP’s 2026 Spring Exhibitions currently on view: Rebel Girl, THE VANGUARD, and Scent of Broq-Pa by Ziesook You, led by Anne Leighton Massoni, HCP Executive Director and Curator. RSVP is required via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Exhibiting Artist Workshop: Scent of Broq-Pa by Ziesook You
item.description:
Saturday, May 2, 2026 at 11:30 AM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Saturday, May 2, between 11:30 am to 1:00 pm CST for a Floral Arrangement Workshop and ticketed Portrait Sessions with exhibiting HOU artist Ziesook You. Limited spots available. This event will follow a Curatorial Walkthrough with Anne Leighton Massoni, starting at 10:30 am.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Photobook Club - Cristina Velásquez
item.description:
Sunday, May 17, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Hirsch Library at the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston

HCP Members are invited to May’s HCP Photobook Club meeting led by Jon Evans hosting Cristina Velásquez, artist, publisher, co-founder and editor-in-chief of New Poetics Publishing, and art director at Paisajes Coloniales.Registration is available via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: HCP Summer Open House (online)
item.description:
Tuesday, May 26, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Online via Zoom

Join us on online Tuesday, May 26, between 6-8 PM CST at our Summer Open House with guest speaker Violette Bule. Learn about our upcoming courses, hands-on workshops, free events, and professional certificate programs. Have your work reviewed, and receive a free personal consultation from Natan Dvir and a 10% discount on Summer classes.RSVP is required via this link.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Opening Reception: Madre Patria by Simon Silva
item.description:
Thursday, May 28, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Thursday, May 28th, between 6pm to 8pm for the opening reception of Madre Patria by Simon Silva. Madre Patria is a solo exhibition in our HOU gallery exploring the artist’s first trip to Oaxaca, Mexico, his motherland.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Spring Cleaning Print Sale
item.description:
Thursday, May 28, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Tis the season for spring cleaning! Save the date for HCP’s print sale of existing inventory, taking place on Thursday, May 28 from 11 AM - 8 PM; Friday, May 29 from 11 AM - 5 PM; and Saturday, May 30 from 11 AM - 7 PM. Unframed work will be available for purchase from $10-$500, and framed work at 20-50% under its fair market value.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Opening Reception: 43rd Center Annual
item.description:
Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Thursday, June 4th, from 6 - 8 PM for the opening reception of our 43rd Center Annual exhibition! Featuring the work of 35 artists across the globe, this year’s Center Annual was juried by Asha Iman Veal.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: June Critique Group: Fernando Castro
item.description:
Monday, June 15, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

HCP Members are invited to join our June Critique Group led by Fernando Castro, Curator, Sicardi Ayers Bacino. You may register for free as a Presenter and get feedback on your work from Castro and fellow HCP members, or as an Attendee and partake in the discussion. Our critique groups provide a supportive and professional environment to share your work and take the next step.Please visit our Critique Groups page for more information.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Opening Reception: Split Second
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: 1441 W Alabama St, Houston, TX 77006

Join us Thursday, June 18th, between 6pm to 8pm for the opening reception of Split Second, a group exhibition celebrating artists whose work engages the world of sports and athletic culture during FIFA’s World Cup festivities in Houston. Featured artists include Eli Durst, Geoff Winningham, Jorge Pineda, Patty Carroll, and Tay Butler.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Pride & Passion - 6/21/2026 6:00 PM
item.description:
Sunday, June 21, 2026 at 6 PM

From Hobby Center for the Performing Arts

Event details

item.description:
Wednesday, June 24, 2026 at 7 PM

item.description:

item.title: Rick Ross - 6/26/2026 8:00 PM
item.description:
Friday, June 26, 2026 at 8 PM

From Hobby Center for the Performing Arts

Event details

item.title: Artist Talk: Wrapped in Memory with Job García
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Julia Ideson Building, 2nd Floor, Reading Room

Join us at the Houston Public Library on Saturday, June 27th, from 2 - 4 PM for a partnered artist talk with Job García on his forthcoming photo book ¡Qué Vivan las Cobijas, Cabrones! Family Artifacts and the Maintenance of Mexican Identity! Moderated by Areli Navarro Magallón, Exhibitions & Programs Coordinator at HCP.

From Houston Center for Photography

Event details

item.title: Forever Nebrada - 6/27/2026 7:30 PM
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Jersey Boys – 8/22/2027 7:00 PM

Sunday, July 19, 2026 at 2 PM
